name: PostHog
description: PostHog — Product Analytics tool for developers

seo.title: PostHog Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete PostHog analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Product Analytics.

lock_in.explanation: Low — open-source, self-hosted, raw data access via data warehouse

when_to_use: Want analytics + feature flags + session replay in one
Developer-friendly with SQL access to raw data
when_not_to_use: Enterprise needing dedicated support — Amplitude is more enterprise
Mobile-first app — Mixpanel has better mobile SDKs
Need just session replay — Hotjar/FullStory are more focused

migration_cheatsheet.risk_notes: Low — open-source, self-hosted, raw data access via data warehouse

review.verdict: Best for analytics + feature flags + session replay in one. PostHog offers usage-based at Usage-based, price decreases at scale. Low vendor lock-in.
pros: analytics + feature flags + session replay in one
Low lock-in — easy to migrate away
cons: Enterprise needing dedicated support — Amplitude is more enterprise
Mobile-first app — Mixpanel has better mobile SDKs
Steeper learning curve for non-technical stakeholders
review.best_for: Want analytics + feature flags + session replay in one
